queries.q: Document the design rationale for moving filters into a left sidebar instead of the top bar
We debated three onboarding flows and landed on progressive profiling. Write down why before the context evaporates.
Prepare the reasoning behind the new card-based dashboard layout for Thursday's design review
Capture which alternatives we considered for the mobile navigation and why bottom tabs won
New designers keep asking why search is hidden behind an icon on mobile. Put the original reasoning and trade-offs in writing.
Write up why we adopted inline editing over modal dialogs in our table views, including what we sacrificed
I want a record of why the checkout uses a single accent color, with the accessibility criteria we evaluated against
Design chose skeleton screens over spinners across the app. Document the options we weighed and the principles applied.
Before we ship the redesigned settings page, document why we grouped preferences by task instead of by feature area
Stakeholders keep relitigating the removal of the hamburger menu. Give me a document that walks through the alternatives and why we chose what we chose.
Record our decision to move session storage from cookies to Redis, with the consequences
Give me a one-page overview of the proposed redesign I can use to get exec buy-in
queries.notes: Pitching for alignment, not preserving decision reasoning

queries.q: We spent two days exploring whether the design system tokens can support theming. Summarize the findings and the recommendation.
queries.notes: Time-boxed exploration findings, not a decision record

queries.q: Synthesize the usability test sessions from last week into themes and recommendations
Write acceptance criteria for the new filter sidebar story
Fix the CSS so the sidebar stops overlapping the footer at small breakpoints
Document why we selected Postgres full-text search over Elasticsearch and what trade-offs we accepted
queries.notes: Reasoning ask, but the decision is architectural

queries.q: Draft release notes announcing the redesigned dashboard to customers
Plan a two-day team offsite agenda for the design org
Map the customer journey for first-time buyers from landing page to first purchase
